description: Upgrade plan to migrate project to latest LTS versions

tasks.description: Upgrade to Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.4
tasks.requirements: Upgrade JDK to 21, Spring Boot to 3.4, Spring Framework to 6.x, and migrate javax.* to jakarta.* namespaces where applicable. Update all related Spring dependencies (Spring Security, Spring Data, etc.) to compatible versions. Ensure compatibility with Java 21 language features and remove deprecated APIs.
tasks.taskSummary: Successfully upgraded Java from 1.8 to 21 and Spring Boot from 2.7.18 to 3.4.5. Migrated javax.* imports to jakarta.* in Photo.java. Updated commons-io to 2.18.0 (fixing CVE-2024-47554). Modernized code using Java 21 features (isEmpty(), getFirst(), formatted()). Build passes and unit tests pass.
